classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'DATA SAFETY MONITORING BOARD — Meeting Minutes (Third Scheduled Review)' and contains DSMB deliberations, safety review, and formal recommendations for Study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. This is a DSMB meeting minutes document, which falls under the SmPC / DSUR / DSMB Charter category.

summary: Meeting minutes from the third scheduled Data Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) review for oncology study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, held on 18 October 2023. The DSMB reviewed safety data from 67 treated patients, identified a higher-than-anticipated ILD/pneumonitis incidence (6.0%), and recommended study continuation with urgent protocol amendments including enhanced monitoring and prophylactic antiemetics.
